releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# v1.3.2

### 优化

* 优化设置修改后的重载流程，避免重启整个插件
* 新增 `reloadHandlers` 方法，用于重新加载插件设置、样式与处理器
* 替换原本通过禁用/启用插件实现的粗暴重载方式

### CI / Workflow

* 注释掉 release workflow 中旧的 zip 上传步骤

---

### Improvements

* Optimized the reload flow after settings changes to avoid restarting the entire plugin
* Added a new `reloadHandlers` method to reload plugin settings, styles, and handlers
* Replaced the previous brute-force reload approach that relied on disabling and re-enabling the plugin

### CI / Workflow

* Commented out the old zip upload step in the release workflow

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### fix

* Adapted to the new Obsidian image click event
* Added special handling for the Muuxi version of the [diagrams](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-diagrams-net) plugin
* Extended selector support to include `video` elements for video file click support

### 修复

* 适配新版 Obsidian 图片点击事件
* 添加对 Muuxi 版 [diagrams](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-diagrams-net) 插件的特殊处理
* 扩展选择器列表，支持 `video` 元素的视频点击

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
* 新增设置页面中外部链接的支持
* 现在会自动检测核心插件 Webview 的“Open external links”选项，以决定 `Ctrl+Click` 外部链接时的行为：
  * 选项开启时，`Ctrl+Click` 将在系统默认浏览器中打开链接
  * 选项关闭时，`Ctrl+Click` 将在 Obsidian 新标签页中打开链接
  * 修改 Webview 核心插件的该选项后，需要重启本插件才能生效
  * 关闭 Webview 核心插件后，保持 Obsidian 默认行为
* 修复文档在模态窗口中，编辑模式与阅读模式下顶部间距不一致的问题

---

* Add support for external links in the Settings page
* Now automatically detects the **Open external links** option of the core **Webview** plugin to determine the behavior of `Ctrl+Click` on external links:
  * When enabled, `Ctrl+Click` will open the link in the system’s default browser
  * When disabled, `Ctrl+Click` will open the link in a new tab within Obsidian
  * Changes to this option in the Webview core plugin require restarting this plugin to take effect
  * After disabling the Webview core plugin, maintain the default behavior of Obsidian
* Fixed an issue where the top margin of documents in modal windows was inconsistent between edit and reading modes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. **Alt + 单击支持打开属性列表中的双链链接**
   现在可以通过 `Alt + 单击` 打开 frontmatter 属性中的 `[[双链]]` 链接。

2. **统一了点击行为逻辑，提升交互一致性**

   * `Alt + 单击`：在模态窗口中打开链接（若在设置中启用）
   * `Ctrl + 单击`：

     * 内部链接：在新标签页中打开
     * 外部链接：在默认浏览器中打开
     
> ⚠️ 可能存在未覆盖的场景或其他异常行为，欢迎在 [Issue](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) 页面 反馈问题。

### 🛠 修复

* 修复了一些点击事件处理中的潜在问题

---

1. **Alt + Click now supports opening wiki-style links in frontmatter**
   You can now use `Alt + Click` to open `[[WikiLinks]]` found in frontmatter properties.

2. **Unified click behavior for better consistency**

   * `Alt + Click`: Opens link in a modal window (if enabled in settings)
   * `Ctrl + Click`:

     * Internal links → Open in new tab
     * External links → Open in default system browser

> ⚠️ Some edge cases may not be fully tested. If you encounter unexpected behavior, please report it via the [issue](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) page.

### 🛠 Fixes

* Fixed several issues related to click event handling

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**New Features:**
- Support for *Outgoing Links* and *Backlinks* panels. #14 
- Added custom exclusion **files** setting in click mode — links inside excluded files will not trigger modals on click. #13 
- Modal size and single click mode settings are now **separately configurable** for desktop and mobile, allowing different setups for different devices. #13 

**Improvements:**
- When click mode is enabled, **text selection** in Edit mode no longer accidentally triggers a modal window.

---

**新增功能:**
- 适配「出链」与「入链」面板。#14 
- 单击模式新增自定义排除文件设置，被排除文件中的链接将不会触发单击打开模态窗口。#13 
- 模态窗口大小设置和单击触发设置现已区分桌面端与移动端，可分别配置，互不影响。#13 

**优化改进:**
- 现在启用单击模式时，编辑模式下选中文本将不再误触发模态窗口。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 更新内容 / Changelog  

**新增功能:**  
- 适配 `Note Definition` 插件。  
- 单击模式新增自定义排除元素设置。  

**优化调整:**  
- 删除命令 `duplicateCurrentContentInModal`，重构后已无意义。  

---

### New Features:  
- Adapted for the `Note Definition` plugin.  
- Added a custom exclusion setting for click mode.  

**Improvements:**  
- Removed the `duplicateCurrentContentInModal` command as it is no longer needed after the refactor.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### New Features:
- Now using `Ctrl + Click` in modal will close all current modal windows and open the link in a new tab.
- Added an option to trigger clicks only in reading mode.

**Bug Fixes:**
- Fixed the option to distinguish between internal and external links when clicking.
- Fixed an issue with the display of the floating icons.
- Fixed the problem where directory jumps sometimes don’t work.
- Fixed an issue where modal windows would still show after using the "close tab" command.

**Style Adjustments:**
- Adjusted the style of the directory.

---

### 更新内容 / Changelog

**新增功能:**
- 现在在modal中使用 `Ctrl + Click` 会关闭当前所有modal窗口，并在新标签页打开。
- 新增单击触发仅作用于阅读模式的选项。

**修复问题:**
- 修复单击触发区分内外部链接的选项。
- 修复悬浮图标显示的问题。
- 修复目录有时跳转不生效的问题。
- 修复使用关闭标签页命令后，modal窗口显示的问题。

**样式调整:**
- 调整目录样式。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 📢 Release Notes  



- **Bug Hunt Success!** Fixed a bunch of issues—some you noticed, some you didn’t. 😉  

This update enhances performance and usability—if you run into any issues, please report them via [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues).  

---  

### 📢 更新说明  

- **修复了一大堆 bug！** 有些你可能遇到过，有些可能还没发现，总之修了很多 😉。  


这次更新大幅提升了性能和可用性，如有问题请到 [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) 反馈。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 📢 Release Notes  

#### ✨ Streamlined & Supercharged!  

- **Core Logic Overhaul!** We've refined and simplified the plugin's core, making it leaner and more efficient.  
- **New Table of Contents Feature!** Now you can quickly navigate through your content with an integrated TOC.  

![image|200x400](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/600f6076-6138-44d1-861c-aca6ddc1bb8b)

if you run into any issues, please report them via [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues).  



---  

### 📢 更新说明  

#### ✨ 更简洁、更强大！  

- **重构核心逻辑！** 重新梳理并简化了插件的主体逻辑，让它更轻巧高效。  
- **新增目录功能！** 现在可以通过内置目录快速定位内容。  

![image|200x400](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/600f6076-6138-44d1-861c-aca6ddc1bb8b)

如有问题请到 [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) 反馈。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 📢 Release Notes  

#### 🚀 Major Overhaul: Modal Window Revamp!  

- **No More New Tabs!** The modal window now appears directly over your current article—cleaner and more seamless.  
- **Goodbye Flashy Glitches!** That awkward tab flicker? Gone. Smooth transitions all the way.  
- **Lightning-Fast Opening!** We've significantly sped things up for a snappier experience.  
- **Long-Standing Issues?** Fixed! We took the chance to squash some lingering bugs.

Since this is a major refactor, please report any issues via [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) .  

Big shoutout to [vran-dev](https://github.com/vran-dev) for their invaluable help! 🎉  

---  

### 📢 更新说明  

#### 🚀 模态窗口大改版！  

- **不再关联新标签页！** 现在模态窗口直接显示在当前文章上，界面更整洁。  
- **再见，鬼畜闪烁！** 恼人的标签页闪烁动画已彻底消失，动画更流畅。  
- **速度大幅提升！** 打开模态窗口的体验快到飞起。  
- **陈年老坑？填平了！** 顺手解决了一些积存已久的问题。

由于是一次重构，如有问题请到 [Issues](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues) 反馈。  

特别感谢 [vran-dev](https://github.com/vran-dev) 的帮助！🎉

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 移动端默认开启单击模式
- 适配 `Nav Link Header` 插件
- 适配 `Web viewer` 插件并移除 `Surfing` 插件的支持，网页加载自动切换黑暗模式
- 覆盖启用 `Web viewer` 插件并打开 `Open external links` 选项后的默认行为
    - `click` 新标签页打开链接
    - `ctrl+click` 浏览器打开链接
    - `alt+click` 模态窗口打开链接

--- 

- Mobile devices default to single-click mode
- Adapt the `Nav Link Header` plugin
- Adapt the `Web viewer` plugin and remove support for the `Surfing` plugin. Automatically switch to dark mode when loading web pages
- Override the default behavior after enabling the `Web viewer` plugin and opening the `Open external links` option
    - `click` to open links in a new tab
    - `ctrl+click` to open links in a browser
    - `alt+click` to open links in a modal window

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🎉 New: Support for the `Web viewer` core plugin

> Since there is no official API, the implementation may cause the following issues:  
> - The `Web viewer` cannot hide the top tab bar.  
> - Setting the web homepage will result in a second reload.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### 新增
- 设置创建文件后在模态窗口打开的延时（一般不需调整，除非模态窗口打开内容经常出现异常）
- 阅读模式下支持链接格式：
    - `[**P 人也要时间管理？2024 的实践小结 - 少数派**](https://sspai.com/post/95280)` 
    - `[*P 人也要时间管理？2024 的实践小结 - 少数派*](https://sspai.com/post/95280)` 

### 修复
- 移动端悬浮按钮图标显示问题，和一些样式调整
- 单击模式下重复激活Code编辑框的问题

---

### New 
- Set the delay of opening a modal window after creating a file (generally no adjustment is required, unless the modal window opens content often abnormal) 
- Support link format in preview mode: 
    - `[**P 人也要时间管理？2024 的实践小结 - 少数派**](https://sspai.com/post/95280)` 
    - `[*P 人也要时间管理？2024 的实践小结 - 少数派*](https://sspai.com/post/95280)` 

### Fix 
- mobile end suspension button icon is displayed, and some style to adjust 
- click mode repeat activation Code edit box

releases.description:
- 新增：`Dataloom` 和 `Tldraw` 插件适配 [#6](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues/6)
- 新增：现在右键菜单选项可以在设置中选择开启
- 样式微调，现在在模态窗口中编辑 `Code File` 和 `Diagram` 时也可应用背景模糊

更多：我修改了 `VScode Edit` 插件，现在可以设置代码文件的保存路径，并且可以使用 `alt + click` 进入模态窗口编辑代码块，可以在 release 中下载尝试。

--- 

- New: `Dataloom` and `Tldraw` plug-in adaptation [#6](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues/6)
- New: Now right-click menu option can be selected in the settings
- Style Fine-tuning, now in the modal window when editing `Code File` and `Diagram` can also apply background blur

More: I modified the `VScode Edit` plugin, now you can set the path to save the code file, and you can use `alt + click` to enter the modal window to edit the code block, You can download and try it in release.

releases.description:
- 添加选项：在模态窗口中打开Excalidraw时，可禁用Esc键关闭模态窗口
- 支持 Canvas 节点中使用 `alt + click` 打开模态窗口
- 适配 Rich foot 插件 [issues#5](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues/5)
- 修复：悬浮预览现在位于模态窗口之上

---

- Add an option: Disable closing the modal window with the Esc key when opening Excalidraw in a modal.
- Support opening the modal window with `alt + click` on Canvas nodes.
- Adapt the Rich foot plugin [issues#5](https://github.com/likemuuxi/obsidian-modal-opener/issues/5)
- Fix: Floating preview now appears above the modal window.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复 `alt+click` 覆盖 `ctrl+alt+click` 的问题
- 修复创建 Markmind 文件始终在根目录的问题
- 移除对code files插件的支持  
- 创建 code file 和 Sheet 文件现在默认为`![[]]`嵌入链接
- 添加删除关联附件的右键菜单

---

- Fix the issue where `alt+click` overrides `ctrl+alt+click`.  
- Fix the issue where Markmind files are always created in the root directory.  
- Remove support for the Code Files plugin.  
- Creating Code Files and Sheet files now defaults to `![[]]` embedded links.  
- Add a context menu option to delete associated attachments.  

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2f29d03f-e48b-43cd-a23b-bddfd5c5aa30)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 支持 `Excalidraw` 别名链接，举例：`![[../Apparatus/Attachments/Excalidraw/链表封装|链表封装|500]]`
- 调整文件创建模态框的样式，具体是 `确定` 和 `取消` 按钮的边距
- 新增悬浮按钮，复制打开的网页链接到剪切板
- 修复上个版本导致的 `Excalidraw` 和 `Canvas` 所占模态窗口的比例问题

---

- Support 'Excalidraw' alias link, for example: `![[../Apparatus/Attachments/Excalidraw/链表封装|链表封装|500]]`
- Adjust the file to create modal box style, is to `confirm` and `cancel` button margin 
- New suspension button, Copy open web pages to the clipboard 
- Fixed the proportion of modal Windows occupied by `Excalidraw` and `Canvas` in the previous version

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复：`Components` 插件数据视图中右键菜单无法打开的问题
- 启用 `Note Toolbar` 插件后，调整模态窗口的样式
- `Alt + Click` 支持打开 `Excalidraw` 嵌入文档中的超链接

---

- Fix: Resolved the issue where the right-click menu in the `Components` plug-in data view could not be opened.
- After enabling the `Note Toolbar` plug-in, adjusted the style of the modal window.
- `Alt + Click` now supports opening hyperlinks in embedded `Excalidraw` documents.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复设置打开方式后不立即生效的问题
- 修复上版本修改 `style.css` 文件导致的问题
- 使用 `Surfing` 插件的情况下，`alt+点击` 网页链接后有时会弹出保存网页的窗口，现在已被屏蔽
- Modal窗口的悬浮按钮现在可以选择添加到哪种视图类型

--- 

- Fixed setting not taking effect immediately after opening 
- Fixed an issue caused by modifying the `style.css` file in previous version
- When using the `Surfing` plugin, `alt+ clicking` on a web link sometimes caused a window to save the web page, which is now blocked
- The hover button in the Modal window now allows you to select which view type to add

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复：文件的视图标题选项造成链接的视图标题消失的问题
- 新特性：在模态窗口中添加一些辅助按钮，可以在设置中启用

--- 

- Fix: Issue where the view title option of the file caused the view title of the link to disappear. 
- New feature: Add some auxiliary buttons in the modal window, which can be enabled in the settings

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d6637ea1-c3fb-4fe5-b43a-f32e891a8778)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 适配 `obsidian-excalidraw-plugin-ymjr` 插件

---

- Adapt `obsidian-excalidraw-plugin-ymjr` plugin

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 新特性：增加模态窗口关闭后的自动刷新视图的选项

---

- feat: Add the option to automatically refresh the view after the modal window is closed

![20241013_225833.gif](https://muuxi-oss.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/img/20241013_225833.gif)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复：文件管理器中的文件无法通过右键菜单在模态窗口打开的问题
- 修改：创建 canvas 文件时，链接选项默认为嵌入链接
- 新特性：`alt + 点击` 支持嵌入文件的缩略图，目前支持 Canvas、Excalidraw、Markmind、Diagram.net 插件

---

- fix: Issue where files in the file manager cannot be opened in the modal window through the right-click menu 
- modify: When creating a canvas file, the link option defaults to embedded links
- feat: `alt + click` supports embedding file thumbnails, currently supports Canvas Excalidraw、Markmind、Diagram.net Plugins

![|600](https://muuxi-oss.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/img/20241013_154556.gif)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- `Alt+click` 支持编辑视图
- 移除中键打开
- 优化性能
- 设置页调整
---

- `Alt+click` support editing view
- Remove middle click
- Optimize performance
- Settings page adjustment

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
一次大的重构，增强了插件的稳定性、通用性和健壮性，增强了插件的速度，解决了与 `float search` 和 `templify` 插件的兼容性问题

--- 

A major refactoring has enhanced the stability, generality, and robustness of the plugin, increased its speed, and resolved compatibility issues with the `float search` and `templify` plugins

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🎉新功能：支持右键菜单创建多种文件类型，并在模态窗口中进行编辑，编辑完成后将自动嵌入链接到当前光标位置

---

- 🎉new feat: Support right-click menu to create multiple file types and edit them in the modal window. After editing, the link will be automatically embedded to the current cursor position


![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/377aceca-61f0-4dec-b10d-5f19a65baf1b)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fix some issues

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Modal窗口支持叠加
- 新增隐藏关联标签页头的选项

---

- Modal windows support overlay 
- New option to hide associated tab headers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复 surfing 书签造成的样式问题
- 新增一大批翻译和提示
- 自定义命令添加确认按钮，防止产生过程命令

---

- Fix style issues caused by surfing bookmarks 
- Add a large number of translations and prompts 
- Customize commands to add a confirm button to prevent process commands from being generated

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复一些样式问题 
- 修复在MarkMind插件文档在Modal中双击编辑还原标签页的问题
- 设置增加隐藏文档属性选项

> 警告：对自定义命令有所修改，之前的命令可能会失效，需要重新添加命令

---

- Fix some style issues
- Fixed the issue of double clicking to edit and restore tabs in Modal for the MarkMind plugin document
- Set the option to add hidden document properties

> Warning: Custom commands have been modified, previous commands may become invalid, and new commands need to be added

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 代码整体修改，提升代码质量
- 在安装surfing插件的情况下，modal中使用surfing打开，解决了外链跳转浏览器的问题
- 增加网页头部和文件头部显示和隐藏的开关

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 修复 editing tool 插件固定文件顶部导致的 modal 窗口错位问题
- 添加文件存在检测，防止窗口显示空白
- 修复双链别名时右键选项无法获取链接路径的问题
- 新增在 modal 窗口打开当前标签页的命令（支持链接和文件）

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

- 修复右键菜单消失的问题
- 修复在modal窗口中点击目录不跳转的问题
- 支持在modal窗口中点击Canvas和Excalidraw文件显示在Modal窗口中

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
